scripts.kill-ports: lsof -ti tcp:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti tcp:3005 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti tcp:3006 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti tcp:3007 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1
scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "API,ADMIN,VENDOR,PORTAL" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow,green" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:vendor" "npm run dev:portal"
scripts.build: concurrently --names "API,ADMIN,VENDOR,PORTAL" "npm run build:api" "npm run build:web" "npm run build:vendor" "npm run build:portal"
